title: Create Guns and Boats
description: This mod pack is meant for a small server RP at the turn of the century and gives the world a very industrial feel. The mods used to achieve such things are biome-changing and ambient mods to allow for a better Minecraft experience.
body:
![New Create Guns&Boats Ikarus Update Version 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0443cc1cc845fdb75c6d44019e8683ba26e269b.png)

# **General Summary**
Introducing the Create Guns&Boats Mod Pack for Minecraft! Dive into a world steeped in the turn-of-the-century atmosphere, where industrialization shapes every corner of the landscape. Transform biomes and enhance ambiance with cutting-edge mods, crafting a truly immersive experience.

Unleash your creativity by constructing mighty airships and sprawling factories, revolutionizing the way you build and mine. Explore new horizons with customizable boats and command colossal cannons to defend your territory or conquer new lands.

Join the adventure and embark on a journey through time and technology. Experience Minecraft like never before with the Create Guns&Boats Modpack. Are you ready to forge a new era?

# **List of Mods** 
- **Create** mod pack and accompanying mods 
- Create Aeronautics 
- Another Furniture mod
- Alex's Mobs(Unoffical port)
- Tons of new building blocks
- Xaero's world map and Mini Map  
- 56 mods+
